architectural_notes: Tab-based navigation system for Registration → Attendance Marking → Records View workflow phases
Visual step indicators to show current workflow phase
Enhanced teal/slate color palette with improved contrast ratios
Professional card-based layout system with elegant shadows and borders
Smooth animations and micro-interactions throughout the interface

existing_features.title: Create a frontend interface with a webcam capture component that allows users to capture face images for attendance
Build a person registration form where users can input their name and capture their face image to register in the system
Implement a manual attendance marking interface that allows users to select a registered person and mark their attendance with timestamp
Create an attendance records view that displays all attendance entries in a table format with columns for name, date, time, and status
Add date filter controls to the attendance records view allowing users to filter records by specific date or date range
Design a modern, professional interface with a clean color scheme featuring teal and slate tones, clear typography with proper hierarchy, and organized card-based layouts for different sections

Redesign the entire application interface with a modern, polished visual style featuring refined spacing, improved visual hierarchy, professional card layouts with elegant shadows and borders, and smooth animations and micro-interactions throughout all components
Enhance the color palette by refining the existing teal and slate theme with better contrast ratios, richer accent colors, and improved readability while maintaining the professional aesthetic

Implement tab-based navigation system to separate the three workflow phases: Registration, Attendance Marking, and Records View, with clear visual indicators showing the active tab and current workflow phase
Add professional icons to each workflow phase and key actions throughout the application to improve visual communication and user guidance
Refine typography throughout the application with strategic font weights, improved font sizes for better hierarchy, and enhanced readability for headers, body text, labels, and data displays
Redesign all buttons with modern styling including refined shapes, improved hover effects with smooth transitions, clear active states, and consistent sizing across the application

Improve form layouts in the registration and attendance components with clean organization, clear labels positioned consistently, visible validation states with helpful error messages, and better input field styling
Redesign the attendance records table with elegant styling including improved column headers, better row spacing, zebra striping or subtle row hover effects for readability, and modern table borders

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a backend actor that stores attendance records with fields for person ID, person name, timestamp, and attendance status
Implement backend methods to add new attendance records, retrieve all records, and filter records by date
Complete UI redesign with modern, stylish, and professional interface including enhanced visual design, clear workflow phase separation with tab-based navigation, and premium design elements
